title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shadowfax

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
